channel.title: visualization on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in visualization on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: QuTy - M/M/1 web simulation
item.description: This is a web simulation of a M/M/1 queue and server for educational purposes. Axis/graph/queue are drawn with custom code. The system is stable. Check the web simulation Possible Extension Allow the user to create a Directed acyclic graph of queues-servers with possible inspection of the graph of each queue. Allow modification of parameters
